case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. ANDY NYOTOWIJOYO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
